channel.title: Frontity does not reload after save in dev mode
channel.description:
I just set up a clean install of frontity. In development "npx frontity dev" it does not auto reload on saving. I have made a new theme.
"@frontity/core": "1.13.0", "@frontity/html2react": "^1.7.0", "@frontity/tiny-router": "^1.4.4", "@frontity/wp-source": "^1.11.7", "frontity": "^1.17.1"

item.title: Frontity does not reload after save in dev mode
item.dc:creator: cedricselkmann
item.description:
I just set up a clean install of frontity. In development “npx frontity dev” it does not auto reload on saving. I have made a new theme.

“@frontity/core”: “1.13.0”,
“@frontity/html2react”: “^1.7.0”,
“@frontity/tiny-router”: “^1.4.4”,
“@frontity/wp-source”: “^1.11.7”,
“frontity”: “^1.17.1”

Read full topic
item.source: Frontity does not reload after save in dev mode
